failedAssertions.reason: Live /api/auth/login attempts 1-10 did not include required X-RateLimit-* headers.
Live /api/auth/login attempt 11 returned 401 without Retry-After instead of 429.
Live tampered HMAC returned 401 rather than required 403.
Current test coverage does not verify credentials are absent from live process list (ps/cmdline).
No authenticated image transfer success test found for off-argv authentication path.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No accessible live project webhook secret in this validation isolation context to generate a guaranteed-valid HMAC.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Validation Concurrency limits and Flow Validator Guidance sections for curl and go-test surfaces.
Documented critical-security round-1 live validation frictions/blockers (rate-limit headers, webhook secret prerequisite, webhook mismatch status expectation).
